title: Targeted Capture Method Using BAC Libraries for Sequencing Large Genes
author: Kae Koganebuchi
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.qpndvme

steps.title: The concentration was measured using a NanoPhotometer (Implen)
steps.instruction: The concentration was measured using a NanoPhotometer (Implen).

steps.title: The total amount of 5 μg...
steps.instruction: The total amount of 5 μg of BAC was sheared using a Covaris S2 sonicator (Covaris) using default settings of the peak from 350 to 750 bp.

steps.title: The sheared BACs were purified using...
steps.instruction: The sheared BACs were purified using a MinElute PCR Purification Kit (Qiagen).
1.5-μg sheared BACs per capture reaction were prepared.

steps.title: the products were then biotinylated according...
steps.instruction: the products were then biotinylated according to the protocol used in Maricic et al., (2010) .

steps.title: Blocking oligonucleotide solutions (Maricic et al
steps.instruction: Blocking oligonucleotide solutions (Maricic et al., 2010) and human Cot-1 DNA were added to the library solution.

steps.title: The solution was dried out using...
steps.instruction: The solution was dried out using a heat block at 95C.

steps.title: Hybridization buffer and formamide added to...
steps.instruction: Hybridization buffer and formamide added to the dried DNA, and the mixture was suspended by vortex mixing.

steps.title: The suspended mixture was single-stranded using...
steps.instruction: The suspended mixture was single-stranded using a heat block at 95C for 10 min.

steps.title: Biotinylated BAC baits (500 ng) eluted by 4
steps.instruction: Biotinylated BAC baits (500 ng) eluted by 4.5 μL PCR grade water was added to the single-stranded DNA mixture and mixed by pipetting.

steps.title: The solution was heated in a...
steps.instruction: The solution was heated in a thermal cycler to 95C for 10 min and incubated at 65C overnight (12–16 h).

steps.title: Following incubation, Dynabeads M-270 Streptavidin (Invitrogen;...
steps.instruction: Following incubation, Dynabeads M-270 Streptavidin (Invitrogen; CA, USA) was added to the hybridization mixture.

steps.title: Bound DNA fragments were washed and...
steps.instruction: Bound DNA fragments were washed and eluted using NGS MagnaStand (Nippon Genetics, Tokyo, Japan).

steps.title: After the wash and the elution,...
steps.instruction: After the wash and the elution, PCRs were run of the enriched library (26 μL) before removing magnetic beads. The 5 μL of the eluted library was used as a template for PCR in a 50 μL solution containing deoxynucleotide (dNTP) 0.3 mM, 0.5 μM of each primer, Sol_bridge_P5 and Sol_bridge_P7 in Maricic et al. (2010), 1.0 U of KAPA HiFi DNA Polymerase (Kapa Biosystems). The 1st post-capture PCR was carried out following the cycling reaction: an initial denaturing step at 98C for 2 min, 8 cycles of denaturation at 98C for 10 sec, annealing at 60C for 15 sec, extension at 68C for 50 sec.

steps.title: The PCR amplicon was purified using...
steps.instruction: The PCR amplicon was purified using a MinElute PCR Purification Kit (Qiagen).

steps.title: The 2nd capture was conducted using...
steps.instruction: The 2nd capture was conducted using the enriched and purified library using the same steps as in the 1st capture. The 2nd post-capture PCR of the 2nd captured library was run in 13 cycles using the same cycling condition as in the 1st post-capture PCR.

steps.title: The PCR amplicon was purified using...
steps.instruction: The PCR amplicon was purified using a MinElute PCR Purification Kit (Qiagen).

steps.title: Quantification of the amplified capture library...
steps.instruction: Quantification of the amplified capture library was conducted with a KAPA Library Quantification Kit for Illumina NGS platforms (Kapa Biosystems) and a 2100 Bioanalyzer (Agilent Technologies).

steps.title: IMPORTANT
steps.instruction: IMPORTANT: In BDC section, please check the details of reagents and oligos with ' Maricic et al., Multiplexed DNA Sequence Capture of Mitochondrial Genomes Using PCR Products (2010)' and the NimbleGen technical note “Double Capture: High Efficiency Sequence Capture of Small Targets for use in SeqCap EZ Library, Applications on 454 Sequencing Systems.”

steps.title: NucleoBond BAC 100 (Macherey-Nagel; Düren, Germany)...
steps.instruction: NucleoBond BAC 100 (Macherey-Nagel; Düren, Germany) was used to purify the BAC.
